requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as memname , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as salary , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan + sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint as total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.real_receive , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.receive_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'MONTH (ตามวัน)' ) as requestment_month_form , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'MONTH' ) as requestment_month , current_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit , (select coalesce(sum(sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as principal_of_loan , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as member_group , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no )) as member_group_name , (case when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000020' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '23' then 'อื่นๆ/บำนาญกทม. ' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000020' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '24' then 'อื่นๆ/บำนาญกทม.' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000005' then 'รร. สังกัดสพฐ.' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000010' then 'กรุงเทพมหานคร' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000015' then 'ส่วนกลาง' else sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major end)as member_group_major_name
, (case when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000020' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '23' then '4' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000020' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '24' then '5' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000005' then '1' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000010' then '2' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000015' then '3' else sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major end)as member_group_major_code
, (case when (case when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000020' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '23' then 'อื่นๆ/บำนาญกทม. ' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000020' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '24' then 'อื่นๆ/บำนาญกทม.' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000005' then 'รร. สังกัดสพฐ.' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000010' then 'กรุงเทพมหานคร' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000015' then 'ส่วนกลาง' else sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major end) = 'อื่นๆ/บำนาญกทม. ' then 'กู้กองทุนสงเคราะห์' when (case when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000020' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '23' then 'อื่นๆ/บำนาญกทม. ' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000020' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '24' then 'อื่นๆ/บำนาญกทม.' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000005' then 'รร. สังกัดสพฐ.' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000010' then 'กรุงเทพมหานคร' when sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000015' then 'ส่วนกลาง' else sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major end) = 'อื่นๆ/บำนาญกทม.' then 'กู้บำนาญ' else null end)as remark , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.paid_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type and pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_major and sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type in ('20','22','23','24','44') and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.other_loan_status = '0' --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '6620001903' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
